message:
Implement toolchain verification and auto-installation on worker

Adds comprehensive toolchain verification to the worker agent,
enabling automatic toolchain installation via rustup when a required
toolchain is not present. Completes bead remote_compilation_helper-0lo.

New Module (rch-wkr/src/toolchain.rs):
- Thread-safe cache using RwLock<Option<HashSet<String>>>
- is_toolchain_available(): Query rustup for toolchain presence
- install_toolchain(): Install via rustup with --profile minimal
- ensure_toolchain(): Main entry point - check cache, install if needed
- parse_toolchain_string(): Parse "nightly-2024-01-15" format
- strip_target_triple(): Handle platform-suffixed toolchains

CLI Integration:
- Added --toolchain/-t option to Execute command
- Example: rch-wkr execute -w /path -c "cargo build" -t nightly
- Toolchain verified before command execution
- Command automatically wrapped with `rustup run <toolchain>`

Fail-Open Behavior:
- If toolchain installation fails, logs warning and continues
- Command runs with default toolchain rather than blocking
- Agent is never blocked by toolchain issues

Performance:
- Cache avoids repeated rustup queries for same toolchain
- Minimal profile installation reduces download size and time
- Cache persists across command invocations

Tests (17 total):
- parse_toolchain_string variants (stable, nightly, beta, dates)
- strip_target_triple for various platforms
- is_date_format validation
- cache_operations (clear, get)
- Integration tests (ignored, require rustup)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
